title: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
summary_full: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
summary_public: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately
